data.content: Added a regression test in src/lib/__tests__/beats-page-layout.test.ts to lock the divider below the inline title metadata row, and ignored .knots/_worktree in eslint.config.mjs so bun run lint stays green in generated worktree checkouts. Verified bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build in /private/tmp/foolery-8831 on branch feat/foolery-8831.
